case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY $35,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $35,370.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION TO SET ASIDE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR, AS MOOT. PLAINTIFF'S TOOK MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OFF CALENDAR. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: ANN MENDOZA, CSR #6812

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR DEC-15-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT --SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED TOO SOON, DUE ON 1/31/10 AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY
